## Definition of Done Checklist
- [ ] Functionality complete per Business Scope
- [ ] UI matches Design System (red/black/white)
- [ ] Responsive: mobile (375px), tablet (768px), desktop (1440px)
- [ ] RTL correct (Arabic)
- [ ] AR + EN translations complete
- [ ] Loading / Error / Empty states exist
- [ ] Accessibility: keyboard nav + axe scan clean
- [ ] Tests written and passing
- [ ] Lighthouse > 90
- [ ] `api-docs.md` updated (if new APIs)
- [ ] `project-plan.md` updated
- [ ] No console errors / warnings
- [ ] CI passing
